evidence: Samples-catalog consumption MVP — commits 458a575 (core: installProject→samples + initProject defaults-removal + adoptConception accept-all dual-surface) / f61aead (generate-skills + skill-narrative → samples, the 4th legacy consumer) / a53663e (drop defaults/+registry/ from files[]) (+ step-1 66f6e54). Verified DEC-0018: build/check/test green (pi-context 551 / pi-jit-agents 152 / pi-behavior-monitors 157 / pi-workflows 829, all 0 fail). Runtime demonstration (real library code path, not mocked): init-equivalent (writeBootstrapPointer + dirs) → accept-all CLI (adopted:true, config.root='.context' NOT conception's '.project', 15 block_kinds / 17 installed_schemas / 27 relation_types) → second accept-all skipped (idempotent, not clobbered); install-from-samples proven by install-subcommand byte-compare tests (installed tasks.schema.json === samples/schemas/tasks.schema.json) + samples-only framework-gaps installs + config/relations notFound. TWO fresh-context adversarial probes (Explore, not composer): first PASS on core (1-5) + FOUND generate-skills as a 4th registry/ consumer (NOT-SAFE); after the generate-skills→samples fix the re-probe verdict SAFE-TO-COMMIT (0 registry/ in any SKILL.md, samples paths + accept-all flow present, 8 legacy schemas dropped, prose matches code, pack excludes registry/+defaults/, 551 tests). Two mid-verify defects caught+fixed via plan-mode amendments: (1) block-source path asymmetry (samples/blocks/ prefix — data_path is bare); (2) generate-skills/skill-narrative legacy-catalog residual. registry/+defaults/ retained on disk as AJV fixtures (FGAP-087 follow-up).
